title: Simple Timer
description: Timer above your Hotbar to see how long you play in the current World
body:
# Simple Timer Mod
This Mod will allow you to see a small timer above your Hotbar. You can modify it by pressing H and opening the Timer Settings UI.
You can select Color, Position and Size. 
For pixel perfect positioning, please use the drag button, so you can simply drag the timer where you want to have it. 

Mod will be ported to Fabric and Neoforge in the Future :=)

## Timer Settings UI
![Timer UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e6a4992fb6318e1f5d74aa7f6117bfbe488e922_0.webp)
